<!-- How do you accomplish this now, even if it's ugly? -->

<!-- What would the user-facing surface look like? CLI flag? Web UI button?

## Open questions

<!-- Things you'd want a maintainer to weigh in on before any code gets written. -->

## License placement

<!-- Most features land under MIT in packages/ or adapters/.
     If this feature is multi-tenant orchestration, SSO/RBAC, audit logs,
     or long-retention, it belongs under ee/ (Elastic License 2.0).
     If unsure, leave blank and a maintainer will note in triage. -->

- [ ] MIT (default — `packages/` or `adapters/`)
- [ ] ELv2 (`ee/` — Enterprise Edition)
- [ ] Unsure
